name: Navitas Limited
description: Navitas is a leading global education provider that connects students, agents, universities, and industry partners to exceptional international higher education experiences. The company offers a diverse range of services, including university pathway programs, direct-degree entry, global managed campuses, English-language education, and employability training. By fostering strong industry partnerships and providing increased access to education, Navitas helps students achieve their academic and professional goals. With a presence in numerous countries, the organization is dedicated to delivering high-quality educational outcomes and creating impactful learning environments for students worldwide.
